title: Apex vs Bulenox (2026): Same SB+$100 Lock, Opposite Eval Ladders
description: Apex 4.0 vs Bulenox — both lock the trailing drawdown at Starting Balance + $100. Both let you pick EOD or intraday. Then everything else — eval ladder, consistency rule, choice rigidity, platforms — diverges. Honest 2026 side-by-side.
